TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: D = Below De minimis Amount (NOTE: starting in 2011, this value was retired and was combined with 
"B") 
B = Below Regional Benchmark (2011 forward this may also mean below de minimis amount) 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable
